evidence: frontend/src/components/settings/SettingsWorkplaceTab.tsx — ai_RNbBHYYN info card, ai_RNbBHYYU form, ai_RNbBHYYR privacy notice
frontend/src/components/settings/SettingsMain.tsx — mounts SettingsWorkplaceTab in workplace tabpanel (ai_RNbBHYYM via SETTINGS_TAB_PANEL_BUBBLE_IDS)
frontend/src/components/settings/SettingsWorkplaceTab.tsx — ai_RNbBHYYW label 'Workplace name', ai_RNbBHYYZ label 'HR / benefits contact email'
frontend/src/components/settings/SettingsWorkplaceTab.tsx — ai_RNbBHYYT privacy copy on anonymized employer data
criteria_audit.gap: Static privacy paragraph not independently verified against drsam-99657.bubble encoded text expressions; labels match IR element naming conventions.

evidence: ir/inventory.json — workplace user_type fields name_text, contact_email_text; user field workplace_custom_workplace

functional_audit.check: Workplace settings tab renders info card, privacy callout, name/email inputs, and link button (not placeholder shell)
Link button validates required name/email and rejects invalid email before persist
Successful link persists workplace data for current user and reloads form state (linkedAt)
Supabase client associates user with workplace via profiles.onboarding_data keys and attempts workplace table upsert
evidence: frontend/src/lib/settings/workplaceApi.ts — workplace_name_text, workplace_contact_email_text, workplace_linked_at, workplace_custom_workplace in onboarding_data
frontend/src/lib/settings/workplaceApi.ts — workplace table upsert with graceful no-op when demo schema lacks table

ui_evidence.notes: Panel root wraps full workplace tab content.
IR style_ref Group_card_; implementation uses Group_card_muted_.
Card header with Building2 icon stand-in for IR icon group.
IR style_ref Text_heading_2_; implementation uses Text_heading_3_.
IR style_ref Text_small_; implementation uses Text_body_muted_.
Privacy notice container with border/muted background.
IR Icon child of privacy notice; Shield lucide used but no data-bubble-id marker.
Privacy static copy present; bubble source text not re-extracted in this review.
Two-column form grid for name and email groups.
Label text correct; bubbleStyle(Text_label_) not applied on Label.
Label text correct; bubbleStyle(Text_label_) not applied on Label.
IR parent ai_RNbBHYYU; button rendered outside form div. Dynamic label 'Update workplace link' when already linked.

gaps: AC-2 privacy static copy (ai_RNbBHYYT) not byte-verified against drsam-99657.bubble text expressions in readonly review environment.
workplace-link-btn (ai_RNbBHYYb) DOM parent does not match IR hierarchy (child of ai_RNbBHYYU workplace-form).
frontend/src/integrations/supabase/types.ts has no workplace table — upsert relies on runtime graceful degradation.

critiques.finding: Coverage preflight reuse_decision is 'new' but SettingsMain.tsx already owned the workplace tabpanel shell; this item is gap-fill on existing settings router.
critiques.alternative: Record reuse_decision: 'gap-fill' with existing_files_found including settingsTabStub panel id ai_RNbBHYYM mapping.

critiques.finding: workplace-info-card (ai_RNbBHYYN) uses Group_card_muted_ but IR style_ref resolves to Group_card_.
critiques.alternative: Apply bubbleStyle('Group_card_') on ai_RNbBHYYN or document intentional DS deviation.

critiques.finding: Card title (ai_RNbBHYYP) and subtitle (ai_RNbBHYYQ) use heading_3/body_muted instead of IR Text_heading_2_/Text_small_.
critiques.alternative: Match IR style_ref targets for typography parity with Bubble settings workplace card.

critiques.finding: Privacy icon entity ai_RNbBHYYS (IR element_type Icon) has no data-bubble-id; Lucide Shield used without IR marker.
critiques.alternative: Wrap Shield in span data-bubble-id='ai_RNbBHYYS' inside ai_RNbBHYYR.

critiques.finding: workplace table upsert errors are swallowed silently; user sees success toast even when only onboarding_data persisted.
critiques.alternative: Surface non-fatal workplace upsert failure via toast.warning or log when table missing, matching adminWorkplacesApi transparency.

critiques.finding: workplace-link-btn sits outside workplace-form group, flattening IR tree where ai_RNbBHYYb parent_id is ai_RNbBHYYU.
critiques.alternative: Move button inside data-bubble-id ai_RNbBHYYU container to preserve Bubble hierarchy.
